text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Summer camp season has come again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For Umamusume, there's no season more vital to
their training. At the same time though, it's also a
time to relax.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, Trainer! Look at that group comin' this
way!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Wh-wh-what's going on? Why is everyone wearing
weird masks?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
People walk by wearing various traditional
festival masks—from foxes to tengu demons to
stylized human hyottoko and okame masks.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ooohhh, that one's a kagura dance mask.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Wearing masks and dancing at
festivals has been a custom around these parts
since ancient times!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure these people are practicing their dances
to get ready for the summer festival!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Dancing fools and watching fools. We're all fools,
so let's dance. ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's all from me, Matikanefukukitaru, scholar of
Japanese traditions!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh wow! Lucha libre! No, mascarada!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I had no idea people in this country hid their
identities with masks and danced too!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hmmm, this is a challenge I can't overlook. I need to join this festival!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's right—now's not the time for fear! I must
dive right in!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I won't run away and hide! I'm all on board
for a dance competition!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa seems really passionate about this
unexpected event. It's shaping up to be a very
different summer from last year.
